findings.evidence: A fresh probe classifies a pure unknown-model signal as FAIL while model-not-found and provider-502 are PARTIAL.
findings.required_fix: Recognize only the explicit unknown model signal as model unavailable without broadening generic or argument failures.
findings.acceptance_test: Pure unknown model is PARTIAL; argument and generic failure remain FAIL; classify-existing stays offline.

findings.evidence: The generic template test contains a fixed /tmp path instead of deriving a sibling from the configured fixture.
findings.required_fix: Derive the sibling path from run_dry_run.FIXTURE or another generic fixture value.
findings.acceptance_test: Template focused tests and gate pass; forbidden-string scan has no project-specific path match.
